title: Mariscus gaudichaudii
taxonomy: Mariscus gaudichaudii is classified as a species of fern in the family Marattiaceae. It is a type of tree fern native to Australia. The genus Mariscus is a part of the fern family and comprises several species, including M. gaudichaudii. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its fronds and rhizome. The classification of M. gaudichaudii is subject to ongoing research and potential updates in the field of botany.
